questions.question: How often should I get my teeth professionally cleaned?
questions.answer: Most dentists recommend professional cleaning every 6 months. However, some patients may need more frequent cleanings based on their oral health needs.

questions.question: Does professional teeth cleaning hurt?
questions.answer: Professional cleaning should not be painful. You may experience mild discomfort if you have sensitive teeth or gums, but our gentle approach ensures your comfort throughout the procedure.

questions.question: How long does a cleaning appointment take?
questions.answer: A typical professional cleaning takes about 45-60 minutes, depending on the amount of plaque and tartar buildup.

questions.question: What should I expect after the cleaning?
questions.answer: Your teeth will feel smooth and clean. Some patients may experience mild sensitivity for a day or two, which is normal and temporary.
